title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #14 as dressrosa’s Corrida Colosseum becomes the center of attention as Luffy enters under the name Lucy and learns the Flame-Flame Fruit is the prize.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ladies, gentlemen, and toys of all ages!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's not something for children to see...!! go home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: For today's event, the King has entrusted to us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A fabulous and rare prize, indeed!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The man... the man who lost his life two years ago in paramount war at Marineford!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The second squad leader of the legendary "Whitebeard Pirate Crew" and the son of the pirate King himself, ace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: His blazing fist could pierce even a battleship ... he could race a town, transforming it into a living hell

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: and now his power- in the form of a devil fruit- has been reborn into this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to the winner of the fight goes this forbidden fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a devil fruit of the strongest category- the "logia"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Today, at the behest of our King ...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: We've gathered in this colosseum a number of big names from the new world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But we're not handing over this rarity that easily!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you think you can take it, then try!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: But today's gladiators are of a different class than usual!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For the ones who would receive your challenge ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Are the members of the "Donquixote family"!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
